ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the game in the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "home_team_wins" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the home team won the game */,
  "away_team_wins" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the away team won the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., regular season, playoffs, finals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Central, Southeast) */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive efficiency (points scored per 100 possessions) */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive efficiency (points allowed per 100 possessions) */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game (possessions per 48 minutes) */,
  "free_throw_rate" REAL /* Free throw rate (free throws attempted per field goal attempt) */,
  "three_point_attempt_rate" REAL /* Three-point attempt rate (three-point attempts per field goal attempt) */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage (weighted average of field goal, free throw, and three-point shooting) */,
  "total_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Total rebound percentage (percentage of available rebounds secured by the team) */,
  "assist_percentage" REAL /* Assist percentage (percentage of field goals that are assisted) */,
  "steal_percentage" REAL /* Steal percentage (percentage of opponent possessions ending in a steal) */,
  "block_percentage" REAL /* Block percentage (percentage of opponent two-point field goal attempts blocked) */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage (weighted average of field goal shooting, accounting for three-pointers) */,
  "turnover_percentage" REAL /* Turnover percentage (percentage of possessions ending in a turnover) */,
  "offensive_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Offensive rebound percentage (percentage of available offensive rebounds secured by the team) */,
  "free_throws_per_field_goal_attempt" REAL /* Free throws per field goal attempt (ratio of free throws to field goal attempts) */,
  "opponent_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Opponent field goal percentage */,
  "opponent_turnover_percentage" REAL /* Opponent turnover percentage */,
  "opponent_total_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Opponent total rebound percentage */,
  "opponent_free_throws_per_field_goal_attempt" REAL /* Opponent free throws per field goal attempt */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the team */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted by the team */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made by the team */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted by the team */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the team */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, data scientist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., analytics, coaching, front office) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game statistics */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game statistics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the player in the NBA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
